Wedge the crowbar. Pull it down. See what the chest was hiding.

to pry the chest open.
Fortune's debt
+0 to the next pull

Master Tabled100 —

Tap a table to browse it · tap the ● at a row’s right to keep players from landing there.

Sub-tabled100 —

The first roll decides which drawer of the hoard you reach into — or tap a table on the left to browse it.
Tap an item to inspect it without rolling.

Hoard Manifest

  • Nothing claimed yet. The chest is waiting.
Pity rises after 4 dry pulls (+2 each, max +10) and can carry you to 99 — never to 100.
The Vault must be rolled honestly. Item pages open on D&D Beyond.
